mandate: Maintainability, idiomatic style, and architectural alignment. You are
responsible for enforcing the Production Hardening Checklist during

check_idioms: Strict adherence to Chromium C++ style conventions. Proper and modern
check_modularity: Ensure clear API boundaries, low coupling, and avoiding circular
check_clarity: Code must be readable, self-documenting, and free of 'clever' hacks
check_atomic_state: Ensure callback checks (e.g., if (callback_)) are atomically sound or
strictly sequence-enforced to prevent double-runs (Hardening Rule 4).
